description: Pinned multi-role benchmark corpus for bounded-confidence change contracts.

tasks.prompt_shell: You are planning a multi-file refactor in gnexus.
tasks.task_statement: Split repo state evaluation away from runtime coordination in repo-manager.

orientation_boundary.start: before any repo exploration or tool calls
orientation_boundary.end: first correct edit surface is identified

tasks.prompt_shell: You are designing tests for a bounded-confidence planner surface.

tasks.prompt_shell: You are checking regression risk after a repo-root flattening cleanup.

orientation_boundary.end: first correct test target is identified

tasks.prompt_shell: You are reviewing runtime boundary risk in gnexus.

tasks.prompt_shell: You are reviewing a new planning surface for security truthfulness.

success_criteria: evidence buckets are never flattened into one claim
